card1.title: Introduction
card1.description:
Watch the intro video to learn

the rules of the game

and its central challenge:

to explore powerful future digital solutions

in a fun, imaginative way.

card2.title: Exploration
card2.description:
The Kering Digital Odyssey

is a digital board game with a map

presenting the different regions to explore,

each ofwhich embodies a great value of the group

and aspect of our Digital future.

card3.title: Final
card3.description:
Finish the game by completing all

experiences and capture the Golden Owl

in the last region.



The first finisher will be heralded the Kering

Explorer of the Future.

card4.title: Experiences
card4.description:
On each region, you are invited

to participate in experiences.

After each completed experience,

you win a concept card and some owls

when you complete a bonus.
